message:
chore(deps): update Cargo.lock for rich_rust 0.2.0, asupersync 0.2.3, and new transitive deps

Regenerate Cargo.lock to reflect dependency graph changes from recent
Cargo.toml updates across the workspace:

- rich_rust: bumped from 0.1.1 to 0.2.0. The new version pulls in
  several new transitive dependencies: fancy-regex 0.14.0 (with
  bit-set 0.8.0 and bit-vec 0.8.0), os_pipe 1.2.3, smallvec,
  and stdio-override 0.2.0.

- asupersync: the local path dependency is now resolved as version
  0.2.3 (up from 0.2.0), and its franken-decision/evidence/kernel
  dependencies are resolved from local path crates instead of the
  crates.io registry. Conversely, the crates.io copy of asupersync
  0.2.0 (used by the sqlmodel-* workspace crates) now correctly
  resolves its franken-* deps from the registry. This fixes the
  previous ambiguity where both copies pointed to the same source.

- fsqlite-btree: adds hashbrown 0.14.5 (with ahash 0.8.12,
  version_check, and zerocopy transitive deps) as a new dependency.

- fsqlite-vfs: adds tempfile as a new dependency.

- fsqlite-core and fsqlite-wal: now resolve against local asupersync
  0.2.3 instead of the registry 0.2.0 copy.

No source code changes; this is purely a lockfile update to align with
workspace Cargo.toml edits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
